title: One-Eyed Jacks
writer: Guy Trosper, Calder Willingham, Charles Neider
actors: Marlon Brando, Karl Malden, Pina Pellicer
plot: After they rob a bank in Mexico, Dad Longworth absconds with the loot leaving his partner, Rio, to be captured by the Rurales. 5 years later, Rio escapes from prison and seeks revenge on Longworth, but falls in love with his step-...
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 3 wins & 4 nominations total
